title: YOUTH & FAMILY SERVICES - 211info
text: MARION COUNTY CHILDREN'S BEHAVIORAL HEALTH YOUTH & FAMILY SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Children's Behavioral Health Services work with children presenting with problems of behavior, anxiety, depression, psychotic thinking, and trauma related issues. Services include individual, family, and group therapy that focuses on strategic and structural family issues and support, trauma-related care, and wraparound services (for high needs children). 3867 Wolverine Street NE Salem, OR 97305 Eligibility: Ages 0-18 Hours: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday 8:30am-7pm Wednesday/Friday 8:30am-5pm Email (503) 588-5352 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 588-5352 Reception Main phone (503) 588-5352 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for intake information FEES: Accepts OHP and offers sliding scale fees DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Proof of income if applying for sliding scale fees. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Marion County SITE HOURS: Monday - Thursday 8am-7pm Friday 8am-5pm Services: Adolescent/Youth Counseling Family Counseling General Crisis Intervention Hotlines In Person Crisis Intervention Mental Health Evaluation If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MARION COUNTY CHILDREN'S BEHAVIORAL HEALTH
